auditor.summary: The build generated only a single configuration file (jest.config.integration.ts) which itself has two critical issues: references a non-existent setup-env.ts file and uses an invalid Jest config property name. The three core files required by the build specification (setup.ts, rfq-auth.test.ts, and fixtures/seed.ts) were not created at all. This means 0 of 8 acceptance criteria can be satisfied. The build is fundamentally incomplete and cannot fulfill the directive objective of implementing an integration test suite for role-based authorization on RFQ API routes. The generated code is insufficient to even begin testing, and the configuration file alone would fail to run due to missing dependencies and configuration errors.

top_issues.description: Required test file was not generated. The build specification explicitly requires this file with four describe blocks covering all acceptance criteria. Without it, the entire directive objective is unfulfilled.

Required setup file was not generated. The build specification requires globalSetup/globalTeardown, env guard logic, test database connection, migration runner, seed function, and createTestServer helper.
Required seed fixture file was not generated. The build specification requires deterministic test user UUIDs, role assignments, and an existing RFQ row.
